title: QoL++ Core for Fabric
description: This is QoL++ without the QoL mods, creating a more vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
# QoL++ Core

**QoL++ Core** is a streamlined optimization-focused modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience without the additional Quality of Life (QoL) mods found in its brother modpack, QoL++.
Its availble for both Fabric and NeoForge.

## Featured Mods:

- **Lithium**: Improves client/server performance by optimizing game logic and reducing lag.
- **Sodium**: Boosts client-side performance, offering higher frame rates and smoother gameplay.

## Why choose QoL++ Core?
QoL++ Core is perfect for players who want a faster, more efficient Minecraft experience without the additional QoL features. It focuses purely on performance optimizations to ensure a smoother and more responsive gameplay.

Check out our other modpack, [QoL++ for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qol!)

We also have versions for NeoForge but those are old and deprecated
[QoL++ for NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qol!neo) and [QoL++ Core for NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qol!neocore)
